description: This file defines a utility function 'enableDismissTrigger' for Bootstrap components, which sets up event handling for dismiss actions (like closing alerts) based on data attributes. It imports external modules for event handling and DOM selection, and exports the utility function.

methods.name: enableDismissTrigger
methods.description: Sets up an event listener on the document to handle dismiss actions for Bootstrap components, triggering the specified method (default 'hide') on the component instance when the dismiss element is clicked.
